allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports keys:', list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); exp=d.get\('exports',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(exp, indent=2\)\)")
